Fullscape v1.0.3 fixes truncated QQ Music lyrics and makes explicit lyric refreshes authoritative.

-   Preserves the full decrypted QRC payload when lyric text contains raw ASCII quotation marks.
-   Prevents stale automatic LyricShiori cache entries from replacing a forced provider refresh.
-   Waits for third-party lyric enhancement to finish before restoring shared-cache synchronization, so refreshed lyrics render locally and propagate to LyricShiori.
-   Adds regression coverage for QRC content containing unescaped quotation marks.
